purpose: (1) 앱 아이콘 후보 3안 (2) V1 Classic 테마용 부적 배경 5장
model_suggestion: flux-dev 또는 SDXL — 본인 환경에 맞게 선택
negative_prompt_default: text, letters, hangul, korean characters, words, watermark, signature, modern digital UI, photorealistic, horror, scary, blood, low quality, blurry, jpeg artifacts

items.prompt: Korean traditional buddhist talisman icon, square composition, 부적 paper texture deep crimson red background with gold yellow ornamental border, single bold black ink character 神 in center, kitsch B-tier illustration style mixed with Korean folk art, clean iconic shape suitable for mobile app icon, no text other than the character 神
items.note: 심플한 神 캐릭터형. 가장 안전한 후보.

items.prompt: Cute angry dokkaebi (도깨비) face mascot with tiny lightning bolt, square composition, deep red background with yellow ornamental corners, kitsch B-tier illustration, Korean MZ aesthetic, bold simple shapes, suitable for mobile app icon, no text
items.note: 도깨비 캐릭터형. B급 키치 톤. 바이럴 잠재력.

items.prompt: Minimal modern Korean talisman icon, square, deep red background, single thin gold line ornament forming abstract 神 character silhouette, premium minimalist composition, suitable for mobile app icon, no text

items.prompt: Korean traditional buddhist talisman (부적), aged hanji paper texture, deep crimson red background with faded yellow accents, ornamental black ink brush borders top and bottom, central rectangular blank area reserved for text overlay (60% of vertical space empty in center), kitsch B-tier illustration style mixed with Korean folk art, slightly worn vintage texture, vertical 9:16 poster composition, ultra-detailed ornamental edges only, single ornamental 神 character at top corner, no text in center
items.note: 기본 부적 톤. 중앙은 비워둠 (Flutter에서 텍스트 합성).

delivery.report_format: HANDOFF.md '## 최신' 에 (Windows → Mac) 메시지로 완료 보고. 각 item ID 별 결과 파일명 + 간단한 코멘트 (예: '약간 어두움', 'icon_b는 도깨비 표정 더 화나게 재생성 가능').
